summary_text: **Findings (priority order)** 1. **High: Claude/FUGUE health path is stale and can misdiagnose live x-auto runtime.** `x-auto` contract requires checking the active checkout/runtime, not legacy `Documents`/launchd assumptions ([x-auto-contract](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L57)). But the eval wrapper prefers Claude home skill script first ([x-auto-health.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/x-auto-health.sh#L10)), and both that script and repo fallback use `~/Documents/x-auto` + launchd checks ([repo health script](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/eval/x-auto-health.py#L14), [Claude home health script](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/x-auto/scripts/x-auto-health.py#L15)). Observed: `bash scripts/eval/x-auto-health.sh` printed `FAIL Queue file not found: /Users/masayuki/Documents/x-auto/post_queue.json` but exited `0`; meanwhile live runtime artifacts exist at `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/logs/heartbeat.json` and scheduler process is present (`ps -axo pid,command` showed `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scheduler.py`). 2. **High: FUGUE adapter/handoff does not currently route to x-auto draft generation.** Linked-system SoT only includes `auto-video`, `note-semi-auto`, `obsidian`, etc., no `x-auto` adapter ([local systems](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/integrations/local-systems.json#L2), [peripheral adapters](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/config/integrations/peripheral-adapters.json#L2)). Runner executes only manifest-selected adapters ([run-linked-systems](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-linked-systems.sh#L124)). NL hinting and handoff labels route content to `note-manuscript` but not `x-auto` action ([orchestrator-nl-hints](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/orchestrator-nl-hints.sh#L270), [route-task-handoff](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/harness/route-task-handoff.sh#L401)). 3. **Medium: New draft-only path is implemented in live x-auto, but not integrated into FUGUE control plane.** Live x-auto has safe draft generator and Notion draft upsert behavior (`status=draft`, strips schedule/tweet/posting fields, non-X source constraints) ([generate_draft_candidates](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/generate_draft_candidates.py#L236), [sanitize/validate](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/scripts/generate_draft_candidates.py#L258), [candidate Notion push](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/notion_sync.py#L677), [tests](/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_generate_draft_candidates.py#L153)). I confirmed runtime behavior via seed-run: output kept `status=draft`, and removed `scheduled_for`/`tweet_id`. However, this repo has no invocation references to `generate_draft_candidates.py`, `upsert_notion_draft.py`, or `apply_post_package.py` (repo-wide search returned none), so Claude/FUGUE cannot invoke that path through current adapter contracts. 4. **Medium: Local helper scripts assume fixed host paths.** Thumbnail helpers hardcode local absolute paths ([xauto-thumbnail-gen](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-thumbnail-gen.js#L11), [xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-sync-approved-thumbnail.py#L14)). This is workable on this machine but brittle for “current active runtime checkout” portability. **Can the new draft-only path be safely invoked now?** - **In live x-auto repo directly:** **Yes**, with draft-only safety (`generate_draft_candidates.py` without `--approve`/publish paths). - **Via current Claude/FUGUE adapter side in this repo:** **No (not yet wired)**. There is no registered adapter/handoff path for x-auto draft generation, and health/eval assumptions are still legacy-biased. **Checks run** - Passed: `tests/test-x-auto-skill-contract.sh`, `tests/test-x-auto-note-linking-rule.sh`, `scripts/check-linked-systems-integrity....
